label: PASS
rationale: The target is an Admin1-authenticated Set of the BooleanExpr column on ACE_C_PIN_User1_Set_PIN. Opal gates that ACE row's Set method with ACE_ACE_Set_BooleanExpression, whose BooleanExpr is Admins, and Core says an authenticated authority makes its BooleanExpr term true. Opal also says ACE_C_PIN_UserMMMM_Set_PIN ACEs must support the value Admins, and Core says Set returns an empty list with success determined by status, so SUCCESS with [] is compliant.

label: PASS
rationale: The target is an Admin1-authenticated Set of ACE_C_PIN_User1_Set_PIN.BooleanExpr to Admins OR User1. The AccessControl preconfiguration authorizes setting this ACE through ACE_ACE_Set_BooleanExpression, which requires Admins, and Admin1 belongs to the enabled Admins class after activation. Opal explicitly requires support for Admins OR UserMMMM on these ACEs, and Set success is represented by SUCCESS with an empty list.

label: PASS
rationale: After Admin1 sets ACE_C_PIN_User1_Set_PIN.BooleanExpr to Admins, User1 authenticates and then attempts to Set C_PIN_User1.PIN. Opal maps C_PIN_User1.Set to ACE_C_PIN_User1_Set_PIN, and Core requires NOT_AUTHORIZED when the ACL for an InvokingID/MethodID combination is not satisfied. Since User1 alone does not satisfy an Admins-only BooleanExpr, NOT_AUTHORIZED is compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: The trajectory first changes ACE_C_PIN_User1_Set_PIN.BooleanExpr to Admins, then starts a session as User1 and attempts to Set C_PIN_User1.PIN. C_PIN_User1.Set is controlled by ACE_C_PIN_User1_Set_PIN, and an ACE BooleanExpr is satisfied only when the authenticated authorities make it true. User1 is not Admins, so the ACL is unsatisfied and Core requires NOT_AUTHORIZED rather than SUCCESS.

label: PASS
rationale: The trajectory enables User1, sets C_PIN_User1.PIN, and sets ACE_C_PIN_User1_Set_PIN.BooleanExpr to Admins OR User1. Opal maps C_PIN_User1.Set to that ACE, and Core says authenticated authorities evaluate true in ACE Boolean expressions. With User1 authenticated, the OR expression is satisfied, so Set of the PIN returning SUCCESS with an empty list is compliant.
